patch.value: Net-new read-only command to visualize dependency topology from existing item metadata.
Introduce a read-only dependency traversal command with deterministic tree/graph output modes to inspect item relationships.
pm deps returns deterministic dependency views (tree and graph), has help/contract parity, and includes regression coverage.
